dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.forceFinishConfirm:
Mark this print as finished?

No filament usage will be calculated automatically — you will need to adjust material usage manually in Print History.
dashboard.noLocationData: No spools with both a purchase location and price set yet.
dashboard.noPrinterData: No print jobs with printer and duration recorded yet.

spools.title: Spools
spools.noSpools: No spools yet — add your first one.
spools.noMatch: No spools match the current filters.

form.colorHexInvalid: Must be a valid 6-digit hex color (e.g. #ff5733)
form.noBrandConfig: No config for this brand — set one in Settings → Brand Spool Weights
form.scaleHint: Weigh the spool on a scale and enter the total to auto-calculate remaining:

audit.title: Weight History — {{brand}} {{color}}
audit.correctConfirm: Reverse the {{delta}} g change? A correction entry of {{reverse}} g will be added and the spool weight updated.

prints.title: Prints

form.noAMSPrinter: Select a printer to load AMS assignments, or add spools manually.
form.noAMSAssigned: No spools are currently assigned to AMS trays. Go to Settings → Printer → AMS Tray Assignment to link spools to trays.
form.loadAMSHint: Click "Load from AMS" to pre-fill from current tray assignments, or add manually.

prints.gramsHint: Enter grams used per tray. Inventory will be updated on save.
prints.cloudSuggestion: Values pre-filled from printer data — verify and adjust before saving.

appearance.title: Display
appearance.actionsLast: Tables and lists: actions at end
appearance.actionsLastHint: Move the edit / duplicate / history / delete icons to the last column / end of list instead of the first
appearance.regionalHint: Timezone, currency, and country are normally inherited from Home Assistant. Set overrides here if HA is unavailable or the values are incorrect.
appearance.lowStockHint: Spools below this percentage are flagged as low stock on the dashboard and in HA sensors (1–100)

catalog.propagateToSpools: Update all spools with article number "{{article}}"

bambuCloud.title: Bambu Lab Cloud
bambuCloud.hint: Connect directly to Bambu Lab Cloud via MQTT for real-time print monitoring — no Home Assistant Bambu Lab integration required.
bambuCloud.twoFaPrompt: A 6-digit verification code has been sent to your email address.
bambuCloud.noDevices: No devices found on this account.
bambuCloud.securityNote: Password stored encrypted. Connects directly to Bambu Lab — no third parties.
bambuCloud.noStatusData: No data yet — printer may not be connected via MQTT.
bambuCloud.configureInExperiments: Configure cloud source in the Cloud Config tab
bambuCloud.notConnectedHint: Not connected to Bambu Lab Cloud. Go to the Cloud Config tab to connect first.

filamentSync.title: Filament Sync
filamentSync.hint: Keep your spool inventory in sync with the Bambu Lab filament library.
filamentSync.requiresCloud: Connect to Bambu Cloud first to enable sync.
filamentSync.dirHint_pull: Cloud → local: import Bambu spools, create or update local records.
filamentSync.dirHint_push: Local → Cloud: push your inventory to the Bambu filament library.
filamentSync.dirHint_bidirectional: Both: pull from cloud first, then push local spools up.
filamentSync.linked: {{n}} of {{total}} spools linked to Bambu Cloud

ha.title: Home Assistant
ha.hint: Communicates with HA internally using the Supervisor token — no manual configuration needed.

printers.title: Printers
printers.noPrintersHint: No printers configured. Add your Bambu Lab printer to enable auto print detection.
printers.name: Printer Name
printers.amsSlugHint: Leave blank if AMS uses same slug as printer
printers.energySensorHint: Cumulative kWh sensor, e.g. from a Shelly plug. Read at print start and end to calculate consumption.
printers.priceSensorHint: Sensor or helper returning the price in €/kWh. Used to calculate energy cost per print.
printers.standbyHint: Electricity consumed while the printer is idle between prints. Measured from print end to next print start.

brandWeights.title: Brand Spool Tare Weights
brandWeights.hint: The weight of the empty plastic spool (without filament) per brand. Used to calculate remaining filament from a scale reading.

filamentCatalog.title: Filament Catalog
filamentCatalog.noEntries: No filament catalog entries yet. Click Add to create one.
filamentCatalog.importNoRows: No matching rows found — check that the CSV has columns: Brand, Material, Color Name.

dataTransfer.title: Export / Import
dataTransfer.fmDesc: Full backup and restore of all app data — spools, print history, printer configs, and settings — as a single JSON bundle.
dataTransfer.spoolsDesc: Export your spool inventory to CSV or re-import a previously exported CSV. Rows with a matching ID are updated; new rows are created for unknown IDs.
dataTransfer.bambuDesc: Fetch your recent print history directly from Bambu Lab Cloud and create matching print records in the app. Requires an active Bambu Cloud connection.
dataTransfer.bambuNotConnected: Connect to Bambu Cloud first (Settings → Experiments → Bambu Lab Cloud).
dataTransfer.experimentalDesc: Export your spool inventory in a format compatible with Spoolman. This export is experimental and the output structure may change.
dataTransfer.exportHint: Downloads a JSON bundle with all spools, prints and settings.
dataTransfer.importHint: Select a previously exported JSON file to merge data.
dataTransfer.importNote: Import is additive — existing data is never deleted. Duplicate spools will be added as new entries. Printer configs with the same device slug are skipped.
dataTransfer.importSpoolsCsvResult: CSV import done — {{created}} created, {{updated}} updated, {{skipped}} skipped
dataTransfer.exportSpoolmanHint: Downloads a Spoolman-compatible JSON with your filament types and spool inventory.
dataTransfer.importCloudResult: Imported {{imported}} of {{total}} cloud jobs ({{skipped}} already existed).
dataTransfer.importSpoolmanHint: Upload a Spoolman JSON export (from Spoolman's Export option) to import all spools into your inventory. Import is additive — existing spools are not affected.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Group print jobs into projects for cost and material tracking
projects.name: Project name
projects.noPrints: No prints assigned yet. Click the layers icon to assign prints.
projects.deleteNote: The project will be deleted. Prints assigned to it will remain but will no longer be linked to a project.
projects.assignHint: Check prints to include in this project. Only unassigned prints and prints already in this project are shown.
